session_info.approach: Role-based anchor insertion v5 — line numbers + fixed DB logging

insertions.description: DROP TABLE safety lines for #bRanked, #bSlots, #LineBreakdown, and #recon_temp added to the cleanup block at the top of the script
insertions.anchor_preview: IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#StepFinal') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #StepFinal
insertions.new_content_preview:
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#bRanked')       IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #bRanked
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#bSlots')        IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #bSlots
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#LineBreakdown') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #LineBreakdown
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#recon_temp')    IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #recon_temp

insertions.description: #bRanked temp table (ROW_NUMBER ranks for OP_Default as the only MAX/SUM category) + SELECT INTO #LineBreakdown (no #bSlots needed — no WINDOW_REDUCTION categories exist). Source is #Step2 (line-level pricing table). Joined to #Step4 (hierarchy/suppression table). OP_Default is the sole category; classified as SUM in AGGREGATE_ENC (#Step3_1 and #Step3_2 both use MAX, but at encounter level there is only one category and no suppression IIF chain — #Step4 passes OP_Default straight through, so all matching lines pay). BundledByNCCI hardcoded to 0 (no NCCI bundle step exists). Quantity confirmed present in #Step2 column list.
insertions.new_content_preview:
--======================================================================
-- *** [PRICE BREAKDOWN - INSERTED SECTION] ***
-- PURPOSE : Produce a LINE-LEVEL price breakdown for auditor review.
--           One row per charge line (EncounterID + Sequence + ProcedureCode).
-- SOURCE  : #Step2 (line-level pricing table, pre-hierarchy)
--           joined to #Step4 for encounter-level suppression decisions.
--
-- COLUMN SURVIVAL TRACE:
--   #Step4 <- #Step3_2 (SELECT [EncounterID], [OP_Default])
--          <- #Step3_1 (SELECT [EncounterID], [ServiceDate], MAX([OP_Default]))
--          <- #Step3

insertions.description: Price_Breakdown_Detail correlated subquery added as the last column in the FINAL_JOIN SELECT, immediately before the INTO #Step7 clause
insertions.new_content_preview:
, [Price_Breakdown_Detail] = (
		SELECT STRING_AGG(
			'Seq:'  + CAST(lb.[Sequence]      AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' CPT:' + ISNULL(CAST(lb.[ProcedureCode] AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') +
			' Rev:' + ISNULL(CAST(lb.[RevenueCode]   AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') +
			' | Cat:'     + CAST(lb.[ServiceCategory]  AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' | Billed:$' + CAST(CONVERT(DECIMAL(12,2), ISNULL(lb.[BilledAmount], 0)) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' | Paid:$'   + CAST(CONVERT(DECIMAL(12,2), ISNULL(lb.[LinePayment],   0)) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			CASE WHEN lb.[BundledByNCCI] = 1 THEN ' [NCCI-BUNDLED]' ELSE '' END
		, ' || ')
		WITHIN GROUP

insertions.description: Auditor Query 1 (full line-level detail SELECT from #LineBreakdown) + INSERT INTO [Automation].[dbo].[LineBreakdown_Results] + Query 2 (reconciliation: SUM(LinePayment) per EncounterID from #LineBreakdown vs Price in #Step5) appended after the final OUTPUT SELECT statements
insertions.anchor_preview:
Select [Status], count(*)
From #StepFinal
Group by [Status]
order by count(*) desc
insertions.new_content_preview:
--======================================================================
-- *** [AUDITOR PRICE BREAKDOWN SUMMARY QUERIES - INSERTED SECTION] ***
-- Run after the main script completes.
-- #LineBreakdown = one row per charge line (EncounterID + Sequence + ProcedureCode).
-- ServiceCategory = final hierarchy decision (from #Step4 suppression logic).
-- 'Suppressed_By_Hierarchy' = line matched a category but a higher-tier
--   category won for this encounter.
-- 'No_Payment_Category' = line did not match any pricing pattern.
-- BundledByNCCI = 1 means this line was zeroed by NCCI bundling.
--====
